message:
chore(beads): close 8 resolved issues from fresh-eye audit batch

Bulk status update for issues resolved during the 2026-03-15 fix session.
All moved from in_progress to closed with close_reason documenting
resolution details:

- beads_rust-s2qp: Exclude in_progress from ready (fixed in this batch)
- beads_rust-i653: Delete --cascade dry-run transitive preview (fixed)
- beads_rust-a1rk: Misleading empty ready message (fixed)
- beads_rust-54tl: Force JSON for orphans --robot (previously fixed)
- beads_rust-iqj9: Routed show --format json/toon context (already fixed)
- beads_rust-oap8: Sync import processed count (already fixed)
- beads_rust-rud3: Absent startup bool flags forced false (already fixed)
- beads_rust-vwuc: Changelog --json output mode (already fixed)
